title: tephrosia humifusa
intro: Tephrosia humifusa, also known as creeping tephrosia or low creeping pea shrub, is a small, prostrate shrub native to the tropical and subtropical regions of Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate various health issues. The health benefits of Tephrosia humifusa include its potential to reduce fever, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. Tephrosia humifusa can be prepared for herbal use through infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, making it accessible for those looking to harness its medicinal properties.
